def positive_subprocess_or_shell_call_inside_record_processing_loop():
    rule_id = "subprocess_or_shell_call_inside_record_processing_loop"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag per-record subprocess work that should be batched or hoisted."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
